docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER BICKERSTAFF, SHEILA
OPPOSITION TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER SHEILA BICKERSTAFF'S WRIT OF MANDATE IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 20, 2014, TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF ALL MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. THE COURT ONLY HAS THE OPPOSITION BRIEF AND ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD. PLEASE ATTACH A COVER LETTER TO THE PAPERS REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/EG

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER SHEILA BICKERSTAFF'S HEARING ON WRIT OF MANDATE IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 13, 2014 AT 9:30 A.M. TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE MILLER IN DEPT. 302 TO ADDRESS THE EFFECT OF THE CASE OF MENGE VS. REID IN THIS CASE. PETITIONER TO FILE BRIEF NO LONGER THAN 5 PAGES ON OCTOBER 29, 2014. RESPONSE TO BE FILED BY NOVEMBER 5, 2014. COURTESY COPIES TO BE LODGED IN DEPT. 302. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976 (302)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Nov-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN T. BELL, TEL. NO. (510) 444-4638 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. CHRIS YOUNG, TEL. NO. (510) 622-2215 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. After reading the supplemental briefs submitted by both parties, the court ruled as follows: PETITIONER SHEILA BICKERSTAFF'S Hearing On Writ Of Mandate is Granted. The court remands case back to the DMV to conduct a Prerevocation hearing and to set aside the revocation order. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Reporter: Sheryl Sawyer, CSR # 5976

Ntc Of Hearing On Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Oct-20-2014 Continued To Nov-13-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN T. BELL, TEL. NO. (510) 444-4638 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. CHRIS YOUNG, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. (510) 622-2215 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - PETITIONER SHEILA BICKERSTAFF's Hearing On Writ Of Mandate is continued to November 13, 2014 at 9:30 a.m. to be heard by Judge Miller in Dept. 302 to address the effect of the case of Menge vs. Reid in this case. Petitioner to file brief no longer than 5 pages on October 29, 2014. Response to be filed by November 5, 2014. Courtesy copies to be lodged in Dept. 302. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/MJM

Ntc Of Hearing On Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Continued To Oct-20-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER SHEILA BICKERSTAFF's Writ Of Mandate is continued to October 20, 2014, to give the moving party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of all moving and reply papers. The court only has the opposition brief and administrative record. Please attach a cover letter to the papers reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/eg
